title: zoysia sinica var. macrantha
intro: Zoysia sinica var. macrantha is a type of grass native to China, known for its medicinal properties and traditional use in Chinese herbal medicine. The plant's roots and stems are used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Zoysia sinica var. macrantha has been traditionally used to promote health and well-being, and its medicinal properties include antioxidant, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
